textByHash.309779c7f18b71edf9db78988344bd3d56a815fb: Our main focus is the advancement of Herblore through scientific study.
textByHash.4b08a296b49950333bfaf2a81f03b980e80b429e: I spend a lot of my time researching new product formulas for the lab. Just over here we have a batch of something new that I've dubbed 'Earworm'.
textByHash.a84df3646810ad3e717e10cc40ec453ce229beaf: Nilsal, iknami! Do you need help with anything?
textByHash.b13a2ff1241efa7698ad627006a670d44811a417: As for an end goal... that information is only for senior members.
textByHash.bf4059b6801440028fe0fac61e2feab343175d1f: Indeed! Its effects produce musical auditory hallucinations! Soon, people will be able to listen to music while on the go. It'll sell like hotcakes!
textByHash.da84793c7990d538f7ef57c7074274e2cc0d4757: Perhaps in time, you will learn of it!
